title: rubus × albelliformis
intro: Rubus × albelliformis, also known as the white flowering raspberry, is a hybrid plant species in the rose family that combines the characteristics of Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of anthocyanins and other flavonoids, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × albelliformis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection and supporting immune function. Rubus × albelliformis is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
